site: Petoskey Pit civic bowl (Scenario E, in-situ package)
crs: EPSG:6494 NAD83(2011) Michigan Central, intl ft; NAVD88 ft

dem.value: 2015 USGS LiDAR (MI 13County C16) + 2026 supplement, design rasters at 1 ft

capacity.note: nominal Scenario E baseline; 1,243 Band-A validated; options to 1,505 validated

audience_facing_az_deg.note: seating axis az 132 -> nominal facing 312; bay-view corridor az 330

stage_frontage_ft.note: 70x34 ft low stage core + lateral shoulders; PROVISIONAL (Rule 9 OPEN)

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: event floor between stage and row 1

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> row 18: 35 ft floor + seating depth (rN - r1 radii)

row_count_est.note: formal rows 1-18 minus promenade 5 + aisle 9/10 = 15 treads x 3 sections

ada.value: two 8.33% switchback routes + level cross-aisle (rows 9/10) at 622.01; validated

backdrop.value: open to Little Traverse Bay az 330; no upstage wall (landscape venue)
